name: Leverage Ratio Computation
short_description: Calculates the basic leverage ratio and checks if it meets the Basel III minimum requirement of 3%.

inputs.name: tier1
inputs.description: Tier 1 Capital in millions.

inputs.name: total_exposure
inputs.description: Total Exposure in millions.

name: Basel Capital Ratio Decomposition
short_description: Calculates a bank's Tier 1 capital ratio and Total capital ratio based on its Tier 1 capital, Tier 2 capital, and Risk-Weighted Assets.

inputs.name: tier1
inputs.description: Amount of Tier 1 capital (in millions).

inputs.name: tier2
inputs.description: Amount of Tier 2 capital (in millions).

inputs.name: rwa
inputs.description: Total Risk-Weighted Assets (in millions).

name: Basel III Capital Buffer Requirement Check
short_description: Evaluates if a bank's capital adequacy ratio meets the Basel III minimum capital plus buffer requirements.

inputs.name: min_ratio
inputs.description: The minimum capital ratio required under Basel III (as a percentage).

inputs.name: buffer_required
inputs.description: The capital conservation buffer required under Basel III (as a percentage).

inputs.name: total_ratio
inputs.description: The bank's total capital adequacy ratio (as a percentage).

name: Basel: Capital Adequacy Ratio Change Analysis
short_description: Analyzes the impact of changes in capital and risk-weighted assets (RWA) on a bank's capital adequacy ratio, interpreting the direction and cause of the change.

inputs.name: capital_initial
inputs.description: Initial amount of capital (e.g., in millions of USD).

inputs.name: rwa_initial
inputs.description: Initial amount of Risk-Weighted Assets (RWA) (e.g., in millions of USD).

inputs.name: capital_new
inputs.description: New amount of capital after changes (e.g., in millions of USD).

inputs.name: rwa_new
inputs.description: New amount of Risk-Weighted Assets (RWA) after changes (e.g., in millions of USD).

name: Basel III Advanced Compliance Check
short_description: Assesses a bank's compliance with key Basel III capital, leverage, and liquidity requirements by calculating relevant ratios and comparing them to regulatory minimums.

inputs.name: tier1
inputs.description: Tier 1 Capital (in millions)

inputs.name: tier2
inputs.description: Tier 2 Capital (in millions)

inputs.name: rwa_credit
inputs.description: Risk-Weighted Assets for Credit Risk (in millions)

inputs.name: rwa_market
inputs.description: Risk-Weighted Assets for Market Risk (in millions)

inputs.name: rwa_operational
inputs.description: Risk-Weighted Assets for Operational Risk (in millions)

inputs.name: exposure
inputs.description: Total Exposure for Leverage Ratio calculation (in millions)

inputs.name: hqla
inputs.description: High-Quality Liquid Assets (HQLA) (in millions)

inputs.name: outflows_operational
inputs.description: Operational Net Cash Outflows (in millions)

inputs.name: outflows_contingent
inputs.description: Contingent Net Cash Outflows (in millions)

inputs.name: capital_required
inputs.description: Minimum total capital ratio required (as a percentage)

inputs.name: leverage_required
inputs.description: Minimum leverage ratio required (as a percentage)

inputs.name: lcr_required
inputs.description: Minimum liquidity coverage ratio (LCR) required (as a percentage)
